opportunities.title: Pathfinder Just Cut Ties With Archives of Nethys — Here's the 5e/Shadowdark Lesson
opportunities.why_now: A major system just lost its free SRD reference overnight, which is a live warning for any GM who leans on third-party rules sites at the table.
opportunities.angle: Dry commentary short: 'don't build your prep on infrastructure you don't control' — quick ruling on why print/local PDF backups beat browser bookmarks.

opportunities.title: The $500 Deadfall Box: Cost-Per-Encounter Math for Beadle & Grimm's Latest
opportunities.why_now: Beadle & Grimm's just announced a $500 premium set, an easy target for a wry breakdown of what luxury tabletop swag actually buys a table.
opportunities.angle: Deadpan cost/value teardown — compare the $500 minis/posters bundle to what a GM could build with $20 and a whiteboard, ending on one usable prop idea.

opportunities.title: Sly Flourish's New Crowdfund: Lazy DM Prep or Just More Prep?
opportunities.why_now: Sly Flourish just launched into this week's crowdfunding roundup, and his 'lazy DM' brand is core reading for the exact 5e GM audience this channel serves.
opportunities.angle: Quick verdict video: does the new product actually cut prep time, tested against a real session-prep ruling.

opportunities.title: The One Player You Cut Before Session One (Session Zero Red Flags)
opportunities.why_now: Gnomecast's new episode on 'seeking good players' is a timely hook for a hard-nosed veteran-GM take on player vetting.
opportunities.angle: Blunt list format: 3 red flags in a session zero that predict a bad campaign, told as a GM ruling rather than soft advice.

opportunities.title: Gary's Appendix Crowdfunds Another OSR Toolbox — Here's the One Table Your DCC Judge Will Actually Use
opportunities.why_now: Gary's Appendix just hit crowdfunding alongside other OSR/DCC-adjacent projects, giving a natural tie-in for the channel's DCC coverage.
opportunities.angle: Fast verdict: pull one random table or mechanic from the pitch and show it in actual DCC judge use, skip the rest.
